title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Airtel India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Airtel India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Airtel India family as a Software Engineer in Nagpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Airtel India:
Airtel India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Airtel India!
